input.description: Get repo info and PR comments

input.command: gh pr view 36 --json reviews,comments --jq '.reviews[].body, .comments[].body' 2>&1; echo "---"; gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/reviews 2>&1

content.content:
## Code Review

This pull request expands the Overseerr integration by adding tools for retrieving request details, deleting requests, and retrying failed requests. The implementation includes updates to the agent's tool dispatching logic, new input schemas, and extensions to the Overseerr client and its associated data types. I have no feedback to provide.

input.command: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/reviews --jq '.[] | select(.state != "COMMENTED") | "\(.user.login) (\(.state)): \(.body)"' 2>&1; echo "==="; gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/comments --jq '.[] | "\(.user.login) on \(.path):\(.line): \(.body)"' 2>&1
input.description: Get actionable reviews and inline comments

content.text:
The PR has no actionable review comments. The only review is from `gemini-code-assist[bot]` which left a "COMMENTED" state review saying "I have no feedback to provide." There are no inline code comments, no changes requested, and no issue-level comments from human reviewers.

There's nothing to address on PR #36 — it's clean from a review perspective.
